_note: Pi hooks are registered via pi.on() in the extension (src/index.ts), not via hooks.json. This file is kept for Claude Code compatibility only (CLAUDE_SKILL_DIR / CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR env vars).

hooks.command: sh -c 'd="${CLAUDE_SKILL_DIR}"; [ -n "$d" ] || d="${CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR}/skills/octocode-brainstorming"; s="$d/scripts/brainstorm-run.mjs"; [ -f "$s" ] && exec node "$s" hook --event UserPromptSubmit || exit 0'
sh -c 'd="${CLAUDE_SKILL_DIR}"; [ -n "$d" ] || d="${CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR}/skills/octocode-brainstorming"; s="$d/scripts/brainstorm-run.mjs"; [ -f "$s" ] && exec node "$s" hook --event Stop || exit 0'
